ew_context: Price appears to be completing a major corrective structure from the 98.39 high, with the H&S marking the end of wave B before impulsive decline
pattern_desc: Classic head and shoulders formation with left shoulder at 88.10, head at 98.39, and right shoulder at 87.91. Neckline broken at 82.38 confirming bearish reversal.
key_levels: Support: 81.29 (prior swing low). Resistance: 87.91 (right shoulder), 88.10 (left shoulder)
invalidation: Close above 87.91 on D1 timeframe would negate the head and shoulders pattern and suggest false breakdown
market_context: Crypto markets remain under pressure amid ongoing geopolitical tensions and risk-off sentiment following US strikes in Middle East
full_analysis:
## Market Structure & Technical Context

SOL has completed a textbook head and shoulders reversal pattern with the head peak at 98.39 flanked by shoulders at 88.10 and 87.91. The neckline break below 82.38 confirms the bearish reversal, targeting the measured move down to 66.37. This represents a significant structural shift from the prior uptrend.

RSI at 26.3% shows deeply oversold conditions supporting continued downside momentum, while EMA20 at 86.69 remains below EMA50 at 87.17 confirming the bearish trend structure. ATR at 3.46 provides context for the 8.76-point stop loss placement.

## Key Levels

- **Resistance**: 87.91 (right shoulder completion level)
- **Support**: 81.29 (prior swing low and neckline area)

## Invalidation Level

Close above 87.91 on D1 timeframe would negate the head and shoulders pattern by breaking back above the right shoulder, suggesting a false breakdown.

## Macro & Flow Context

Geopolitical tensions and risk-off sentiment from Middle East strikes support crypto weakness. CFD flow data shows laminar congestion with momentum alignment, confirming the bearish bias.
